About the Project

We Understand You.
We Understand Your Pet.

Mellow Habitat Sukhumvit-Onnut redefines urban living with a "True Pet-Friendly" concept — not just a tagline, but every function thoughtfully designed for genuine co-living with your animals.

SPC scratch-proof, waterproof, non-slip flooring protecting joints
Built-in PM2.5 + pet dander air filtration system in every unit
On-site 24/7 vet clinic and professional grooming salon
Most complete pet-loving community in Sukhumvit
Facilities

Every Space Designed for
You & Your Pet

Functional design that makes co-living with pets effortless — no exceptions.

🐕
Rooftop Pawsome Park
Sky garden split into small & large dog zones, with a saltwater swimming pool exclusively for pets and 360° city panorama.
🐱
Cat Playground & Co-working
Work remotely while your cat explores climbing walls and tunnels — always in your line of sight. Mountain and city views.
🩺
Canine & Feline Habitat
Vet clinic, grooming salon, and wellness center on the ground floor. Pet sitter daytime care service available.
🌙
Window Perch & City View
Built-in window nooks designed for pets to sunbathe. Low-E UV-blocking glass keeps rooms cool, skyline views included.
Technology

Noise Reduction
Technology

Thick double-wall construction eliminates the worry of barking disturbing neighbors. Multi-layer soundproof engineering maximizing acoustic privacy.

Interior Drywall
15mm × 2 layers
Sound Absorption Bay
75mm + 100mm
Dense Sound Insulation
100mm
Isolation Air Gap
50mm

"Blocks 100% of barking from reaching your neighbors."
